description.en: List upcoming events from the agent's connected calendar within a date range.
description.de: Listet kommende Ereignisse aus dem verbundenen Kalender in einem Datumsbereich auf.
description.es: List upcoming events from the agent's connected calendar within a date range.
description.fr: List upcoming events from the agent's connected calendar within a date range.
description.ro: List upcoming events from the agent's connected calendar within a date range.
description.it: List upcoming events from the agent's connected calendar within a date range.

description.en: Manage calendar events — create, update, delete, and list — through your AI agent. Provider-agnostic: works with whichever calendar the agent is connected to (Google, Microsoft, Apple). Every action routes through your configured integration so there is one interface regardless of provider.
description.de: Verwalte Kalenderereignisse — erstellen, aktualisieren, löschen, auflisten — über deinen KI-Agenten. Anbieterunabhängig: funktioniert mit dem verbundenen Kalender (Google, Microsoft, Apple). Jede Aktion läuft über deine konfigurierte Integration, damit es eine einheitliche Oberfläche gibt.
description.fr: Gerez les evenements de calendrier — creer, mettre a jour, supprimer, lister — via votre agent IA. Independant du fournisseur: fonctionne avec le calendrier connecte (Google, Microsoft, Apple). Chaque action passe par votre integration configuree.
description.es: Gestiona eventos de calendario — crear, actualizar, eliminar, listar — mediante tu agente IA. Independiente del proveedor: funciona con el calendario conectado (Google, Microsoft, Apple). Cada accion pasa por tu integracion configurada.
description.ro: Gestioneaza evenimente de calendar — creare, actualizare, stergere, listare — prin agentul tau AI. Independent de furnizor: functioneaza cu calendarul conectat (Google, Microsoft, Apple). Fiecare actiune trece prin integrarea ta configurata.

warp.name: Calendar: List Events

description.en: List upcoming events from the agent's connected calendar within a date range.
description.de: Listet kommende Ereignisse aus dem verbundenen Kalender in einem Datumsbereich auf.
description.es: List upcoming events from the agent's connected calendar within a date range.
description.fr: List upcoming events from the agent's connected calendar within a date range.
description.ro: List upcoming events from the agent's connected calendar within a date range.
description.it: List upcoming events from the agent's connected calendar within a date range.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants a full list of events. For casual introspection questions ('what's today?'), the CALENDAR provider context in the agent prompt already covers it — only use this warp for explicit list actions or wider ranges.

inputs.name: From
inputs.bot: Start of the range in ISO 8601. Defaults to today if omitted.

inputs.name: To
inputs.bot: End of the range in ISO 8601. Defaults to 14 days from today if omitted.

inputs.name: Title filter

description.en: Optional title keyword to filter events by
description.de: Optionaler Titelbegriff zum Filtern von Ereignissen
description.es: Optional title keyword to filter events by
description.fr: Optional title keyword to filter events by
description.ro: Optional title keyword to filter events by
description.it: Optional title keyword to filter events by

inputs.bot: Only returns events whose title contains this text (case-sensitive). Useful for finding specific recurring meetings.

en: Ask the agent what's on your calendar today or this week
Find your next meeting or the nearest free slot
Surface upcoming events for context before another action (e.g. "am I free at 3pm?")
de: Den Agenten fragen, was heute oder diese Woche im Kalender steht
Das nächste Meeting oder den nächsten freien Slot finden
Kommende Termine als Kontext für andere Aktionen aufrufen (z. B. "bin ich um 15 Uhr frei?")

en.question: Which calendar providers are supported?
en.answer: Google Calendar, Microsoft Outlook/Exchange, and Apple iCloud Calendar. The warp is provider-agnostic — it always routes through the calendar integration connected to your agent, so you use the same interface regardless of provider.

en.question: Does the agent create events without my approval?
en.answer: No. Calendar writes run through the warp approval pipeline unless the agent is explicitly in auto mode. You see a preview card and approve before the event is created.

en.question: How is the calendar connection handled?
en.answer: Connect Google Calendar (or Microsoft/Apple) once from the agent's integration settings. The warp uses the tokens stored on that integration to make the call — no need to manage OAuth tokens per warp.

en.question: Does event creation sync back to my actual calendar?
en.answer: Yes. Events are written to the connected provider (Google/Microsoft/Apple) and appear in your native calendar app alongside events created elsewhere.

de.question: Welche Kalenderanbieter werden unterstützt?
de.answer: Google Calendar, Microsoft Outlook/Exchange und Apple iCloud Calendar. Der Warp ist anbieterunabhängig — er läuft immer über die verbundene Kalenderintegration deines Agenten, die Oberfläche ist unabhängig vom Anbieter gleich.

de.question: Erstellt der Agent Termine ohne meine Zustimmung?
de.answer: Nein. Kalenderschreibvorgänge laufen über die Warp-Freigabe, außer der Agent ist explizit im Auto-Modus. Du siehst eine Vorschau und bestätigst, bevor der Termin angelegt wird.

de.question: Wie wird die Kalenderverbindung gehandhabt?
de.answer: Verbinde Google Calendar (oder Microsoft/Apple) einmal in den Integrationseinstellungen des Agenten. Der Warp nutzt die dort gespeicherten Tokens — kein OAuth-Management pro Warp nötig.

de.question: Wird die Termin-Erstellung zurück in meinen Kalender synchronisiert?
de.answer: Ja. Ereignisse werden direkt beim verbundenen Anbieter (Google/Microsoft/Apple) geschrieben und erscheinen in deiner nativen Kalender-App neben anderweitig erstellten Einträgen.
